0.text: Irregularly marginated mass on the medial aspect of the left upper lobe extending towards the prevascular area

1.text: Increased size of the mass in the left upper lobe since the prior examination

2.text: Indistinct consolidation in the anterior and posterior segments of the upper lobe and the lingula

3.text: Increased ground-glass opacities in the left upper lobe

5.text: Right pleural effusion measuring up to 15 mm in depth

6.text: Increased size of the right pleural effusion compared to the previous examination
